name: LexisNexis
description: LexisNexis is a useful legal research surface inside Law.
whyUseIt: People in Law use LexisNexis to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using LexisNexis as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from LexisNexis.
